stops.notes: Peloton Bike Plus is in upstairs bedroom on second floor; approx. 140 lbs. Customer asked whether it may need disassembly; crew to assess on-site. Customer also has a 75-gallon saltwater fish tank; customer will drain it, tank must be fully dry before crew arrives, wrap and handle carefully.

stops.parkingDescription: Street parking; building/service access is via rear service entrance off alley, not front entrance.
stops.notes: Destination building entrance is around the back; movers must use service entrance off the alley. Building manager requires COI sent to manager@elmtowers.example.com at least 48 hours before move-in. Freight elevator reserved/available 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM; movers may not use regular elevator. Mother-in-law will let crew in at destination and mainly speaks Russian.

notes.internalNotes: Customer found us via Google. 2BR move within LA area. Booked 4/22. Customer called to add operational details: Peloton Bike Plus upstairs bedroom approx. 140 lbs; 75-gallon saltwater fish tank to be drained by customer and moved empty; destination access via rear service entrance off alley; COI required by building manager at manager@elmtowers.example.com at least 48 hours before move-in; freight elevator must be used 10 AM - 2 PM; regular elevator not allowed; mother-in-law will be at destination and mainly speaks Russian; customer plans to pay by credit card on move day with 3% processing fee.
notes.customerNotes: Hi John, thank you for choosing Royal Moving! Your move is confirmed for May 10, 8-9 AM arrival window. We noted the Peloton Bike Plus, empty 75-gallon fish tank, rear service entrance, COI requirement, freight elevator window 10 AM - 2 PM, Russian-speaking destination contact, and credit-card payment with 3% processing fee.
notes.crewNotes: 2BR house to apartment. Standard 3-man crew, 1 truck. Origin: Peloton Bike Plus in upstairs bedroom, approx. 140 lbs; assess whether disassembly is needed. Origin: 75-gallon saltwater fish tank will be drained by customer; move empty glass tank only, must be dry, wrap carefully. Destination: use rear service entrance off alley only; regular elevator not allowed; freight elevator window 10 AM - 2 PM. Mother-in-law will let crew in and mainly speaks Russian.
notes.dispatcherNotes: Send COI to manager@elmtowers.example.com at least 48 hours before move-in. Confirm freight elevator 10 AM - 2 PM and service entrance off alley with building manager.
notes.accountingNotes: Customer plans to pay by credit card on move day; add 3% processing fee to final total.
